expectations.text: decision.json exists at outputs/decision.json with {action, preconditions_checked, reasoning} shape.
expectations.evidence: File present; all three top-level keys set.

expectations.text: decision.json 'action' equals 'Doctor' (case-insensitive; 'diagnose' / 'healthcheck' synonyms accepted).
expectations.evidence: action='Doctor' (canonical).

expectations.text: decision.json 'reasoning' frames this as a diagnose-before-rerun decision — it should reference the 0-rows symptom and prefer healthcheck over blindly re-running the pipeline.
expectations.evidence: Reasoning cites '0 rows with existing config+db is usually a quiet news day OR a source healthcheck issue — run Doctor first (cheap, fast, surfaces root cause) before re-Running.' Explicit diagnose-before-rerun reasoning.

expectations.text: decision.json 'preconditions_checked' shows config / DB / token all present (no missing-state excuse for routing elsewhere).
expectations.evidence: All four probes true.

expectations.text: No side-effect commands executed (no real `startup-radar doctor --network` invocation, etc.).
